name: Ward the Standing Stones
description: Something has been disturbing the old wards at the forest boundary. A small group can drive it back if they arrive rested and fed. It should not take long.

name: Drive Back the Blight
description: A section of the old growth has gone dark. The work is slow and demands absolute clarity of purpose — the blight responds to hesitation. They will need to be sharp for this.

name: Walk the Old Deep Roads
description: The deep roads beneath the forest have not been traveled in a generation. What has settled there in the meantime is unknown. They will need to be able to go the full distance.

name: Clear the Low Tunnels
description: The lower access tunnels have been blocked again. Cave-ins or something worse — hard to tell until you're in it. A straightforward job for a well-fed crew.

name: Hold the Mountain Pass
description: Somebody needs to hold a strategic pass through the range against a group who wants it more than they should. The cold at that elevation is significant. Warm food before they go.

name: Descend to the Deep Forge
description: The deep forge has not been lit in living memory. Getting it operational again means going further down than the company has gone before. The temperature at those depths is not survivable without preparation.

name: Outrun the Harbor Watch
description: A simple extraction job. Get in, get the cargo, get out before the harbor watch finishes their circuit. Easy money if everyone is fast.

name: Raid the Merchant Convoy
description: A merchant convoy with better-than-expected security. The take is worth it, but the window is narrow and the margin for error is smaller than they would like. Speed is the only answer.

name: Break the Siege at Ironport
description: The port has been blockaded for three weeks. The fleet has agreed to break the blockade for a fee that makes the risk acceptable, barely. There is no version of this that is not a hard fight.

name: Scout the Djinn Roads
description: The old djinn roads shift. Mapping the current configuration requires a careful eye and a steady mind. A short trip, but the kind where distraction costs you.

name: Broker the Desert Accord
description: Two tribes are a breath away from open conflict over water rights. The Confederation has been asked to negotiate. It will require the right kind of luck — not fortune, but the kind that comes from being exactly the right person in the right place.

name: Recover the Ancient Caravan
description: A caravan that vanished three seasons ago has been located. The cargo is irreplaceable. Getting to it requires crossing the deep desert using roads most people believe are legend. Total clarity of navigation is required.
